emails.subject: Modesto
emails.body: Sean, When you get a chance, please let me know if you would like me to put in that annuity for Modesto or if you want to put it in. Let me know if you have any questions about the spreadsheet that I sent to you. Virginia

emails.subject: RE: Modesto
emails.body: RE: Modesto I'll be putting it in today. To: Crandall, Sean

emails.subject: Modesto
emails.body: Modesto Sean, Don't want to hound you, but Houston has to send payment today and it's 4 pm there. Let me know if you want me to enter an annuity Virginia

emails.subject: RE: Modesto
emails.body: RE: Modesto Virginia, No problem, sorry for the delay. The deal number is 693176. Thanks, Sean To: Crandall, Sean
